description: Composition Red and grey check cargo shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides, patch pockets on the back with concealed button flaps and a comfortable waistband with belt loops and buttoned closure on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Fashionable elements such as checks and styling lends a stylish edge to these shorts from probase. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team these with funny graphic t-shirts. Model statistics The model wears shorts of size 32, length 21" with height 6' and waist 32"
